creator: beastie@tardisi.com
text:
After updating to firefox-21.0,1 the icon is broken

Fix: 

change the symlink to point to
	/usr/local/lib/firefox/browser/chrome/icons/default/default48.png
How-To-Repeat: 	update to it

	/usr/local/share/pixmaps/firefox.png is a broken symlink, because
	/usr/local/lib/firefox/chrome/icons/default/default48.png doesn't exist.
